name: Soya Bean Patties
recipeInstructions:
1 Mash the beans using a potato masher.
2 Add the onion, tomato paste, chilli sauce, parsley and wholemeal breadcrumbs.
3 Mix well to combine.
4 Divide the mixture into 4 even proportions. Shape into rounds and flatten with your fingers to form pattie shapes.
5 Combine the egg and milk in one bowl, and breadcrumbs and sesame seeds in another bowl.
6 Roll the patties in the flour, then dip each one into the combined egg and milk mixture and coat with the dry breadcrumbs and sesame seed mixture.
7 Heat the oil in a large shallow pan. Cook the patties on a medium heat until they are golden brown on both sides.
8 Drain on absorbent paper. Set aside and keep warm.
9 To prepare the sauce, combine all the ingredients in a small bowl. Serve the patties hot accompanied by the tahini sauce.
